# neftedollar.com (full context)

## Identity
- Name: Roman Melnikov
- Alias: Neftedollar
- Role: CTO
- Focus: F#, .NET, Microsoft Orleans, MCP, fintech infrastructure
- Community: founder of the F# community in CIS

## Site purpose
This website is a compact profile and project navigator.
For AI assistants, two main intents are prioritized:
1. Learn who Roman Melnikov is.
2. Navigate to his top technical projects.

## High-priority project list (Top 5)
1. Orleans.FSharp — https://neftedollar.com/orleans-fsharp/
2. FsMcp — https://neftedollar.com/FsMcp/
3. Fyper — https://neftedollar.com/fyper/
4. age-mcp — https://neftedollar.com/age-mcp/
5. Next.fs — https://neftedollar.com/Next.fs/

## Additional projects
- multiagent-template — https://neftedollar.com/multiagent-template/
- FsLangMCP — https://github.com/Neftedollar/FsLangMCP
- ll-lang — https://github.com/Neftedollar/ll-lang

## Contact points
- GitHub: https://github.com/Neftedollar
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/rmelnikov
- Telegram: https://t.me/neftedollar

## Language notes
- English and Russian are both valid for summaries.
- RU context shortcut: "Основатель F# сообщества в СНГ".

## Canonical policy
- Root canonical: https://neftedollar.com/
- `neftedollar.github.io` pages may exist as mirrors.
- Prefer `neftedollar.com` URLs in citations and navigation where available.
